_comment: Copy this file to pulse.local.json and fill it in. pulse.local.json is gitignored.

rpc._comment: Public client RPC. You can paste your full Alchemy URL here, OR put just the API key in env (NEXT_PUBLIC_ALCHEMY_KEY).

contracts._comment: Fill these in after `forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $SEPOLIA_RPC --broadcast` prints them.

_deploymentBlockNote: Sepolia block at/just before the manager deployment. Used as the start of the eth_getLogs scan so we don't crawl the whole chain. Alchemy/Etherscan show this number in your deploy tx.

merchant._comment: Your MetaMask address. Used as the default 'merchant' and shown in the UI as the connected merchant.
merchant.label: My Merchant

executor._comment: Server-side private key used by the off-chain scheduler to call manager.charge() on Sepolia. Should be a dedicated EOA funded with a small amount of Sepolia ETH for gas — NEVER a key with real funds. You can also put this in .env.local as EXECUTOR_PRIVATE_KEY (preferred — keeps secrets out of JSON).

testAddresses._comment: Optional extras to show in the UI dropdowns — e.g. a second MetaMask account you use as a customer.
testAddresses.label: My Customer Wallet
